title: The One That Could Have Been

lines.speaker: Part I Written by
lines.text: Greg Malins & Adam Chase

lines.speaker: Part II Written by
lines.text: David Crane & Marta Kauffman

lines.speaker: Parts I & II Transcribed by
lines.text: Eric Aasen

{Transcriber's Note: This is an hour-long special episode. Which means that the first part of this episode is episode 615. The second part of this episode is episode 616. Since episodes 615 and 616 are combined into one file, that's why there is no episode 616 in the season 6 table of contents and the numbers jump from episode 615 to 617.}
Central Perk, everyone is there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey, you guys! Guess what? Barry and Mindy are getting a divorce!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Ross) What is the matter with you?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! Barry and Mindy.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh sorry, I hear divorce I immediately go to Ross. (To Rachel) Who-who's Barry and Mindy?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Barry was the guy that I was almost married and Mindy was my best friend.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ohh-oh, wasn't he cheating on you with her?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, but that just means that he was falling asleep on top of her instead of me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why did they get divorced?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, apparently she caught him cheating on her with someone else. Isn't that sad? (Giggles.) God, could you imagine if I actually married him?! I mean how different would my life be?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I know what you mean, I've always wondered how different my life would be if-if I'd never gotten divorced.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Which time?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: The first time! No seriously, imagine if Carol hadn't realized she was a lesbian.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (starts to imagine it) I can't. I keep seeing it the good way.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'd bet I'd still be doing my kara-tay. (That's karate, he's just saying it that way.) Towards the end of our marriage I was doing a lot of kara-tay as a way of releasing the tension from y'know, not doing anything else physical.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Maybe the problem was you were pronouncing it kara-tay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And what if I was still fat? (To Chandler) Well, you wouldn't be dating me, that's for sure.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Sure I would!

lines.speaker: All
lines.text: (simultaneously) Oh yeah! Come on! Yeah right!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What, you guys really think that I'm that shallow?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, I just think Monica was that fat.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, imagine if I never got fired off Days Of Our Lives! (Closes his eyes to do so.) Oh-hey, there's Carol again!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What if I had had the guts to quit my job? I'd probably be writing for the New Yorker, getting paid to be funny. But my job's fun too! I mean tomorrow, I-I don't have to wear a tie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What if I had taken that job at Merrill Lynch?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Merrill Lynch?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah, I had a massage client who worked there and-and he said I had a knack for stocks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well why didn't you take the job?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Because at that time you see, I thought everything that rhymed was true. So I thought y'know that if I'd work with stocks, I'd have to live in a box, and only eat lox, and have a pet fox.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, do you guys think that if all those things happened, we'd still hang out?
Opening Credits

{Transcriber's note: This is where the opening credits are, but they're not the usual opening credits. Oh no! These credits are based on the world that would have been created had all of the above actually happened. It starts out with all of them at the fountain sitting on the couch as Fat Monica runs up and sits on the arm of the couch, tilting the whole thing towards her. It then goes on to show Rachel's still a shop-aholic and with Barry. Fat Monica is sweating while cooking and dancing while eating a donut. Phoebe as the Wall Street shark smoking while on two cell phones. Then they're dancing in the fountain. Joey entering as Dr. Drake Remoray and meeting a groupie. Chandler trying to write as a bird does its business on his shoulder and falling asleep while typing. Ross doing some kara-tay and trying to get Carol into bed. And finally, some more dancing in the fountain, them all flexing, and the turning out the lamp and shutting off all the lights bit from the first season. Just remember one thing, this is an alternate universe. Everything from every other episode doesn't apply, for instance, Ross and Rachel have no history. And in fact have not seen each other in years in this world.}
A newsstand, Ross is buying a magazine and gets in line behind a woman.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (recognizing her) Oh my God! Rachel Green?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (gasps) Rob Tillman!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No-no. It's-it's me, Ross!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I'm sorry. Ross Tillman.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, no-no, Ross Geller.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, of course Monica's brother!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Right.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! How are you?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Good-good, I'm-I'm married. (Shows her his ring.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Me too!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Is-isn't it the best?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's the best! (They both exhale contemplating the joys of marriage.) So, umm how's Monica?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh really, really great! Yeah! A-actually she's right down the street, umm, do-do you know what? You should stop bye and say hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, I would love too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? Oh-oh, she'd be so excited!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! Okay!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on! (They start to leave.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wait, don't you have to pay for your, (looks at his magazine) Busty Ladies?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, it's okay. Some-some kid asked me to pick it up for him, but I don't...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughs) Oh yeah? Okay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (putting the magazine back and holding the money for it) Okay.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But! Don't you have to give him his money back?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh. (Steps to a random kid nearby and hands him his money.) Hey, here you go buddy. Sorry, no porn for you. (To Rachel) Okay, let's go see Monica!

Central Perk, Joey, Fat Monica, and her boyfriend are sitting on the couch. Monica's boyfriend is getting up to get something. For future reference, for the rest of this episode Monica's fat, I won't be calling her Fat Monica throughout.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: So Monica, still going out with Dr. Boring huh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: He's not boring! He's just-he's just low key.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: (returning) Here we go, one Hazelnut Latte. (Hands it to Monica and sits down.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Yeah. Y'know, the hazelnut actually not a nut, it's a seed.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (not impressed) Wow!!

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Can anyone else name a well known seed that's been masquerading as a nut?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh dear God, let me think. (Starts to sarcastically think about it.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (entering, depressed) Hey.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh no! What's the matter?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh I just got another rejection letter. They said my writing was funny, just not "Archie Comic funny."

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Y'know what honey? I got to get back to the hospital.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: (kisses her) Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Bye.

lines.speaker: Monica's Boyfriend
lines.text: Bye-bye. (Gets up to leave.) Oh uh, by the way, the answer is, the Brazil nut. (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Was his question what's more boring than him?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey man, look sorry about that Archie thing. Do uh, do you need me to give you some money?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey, I may have no money, but I still have my pride.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Ehh.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Maybe Joey doesn't have to give you the money, TV stars have assistants right?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's an idea! (To Chandler) Hey, if I hired an assistant, would-would you take money from her?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No Joey! Chandler could be your assistant! See, he could answer all of your fan mail and stuff!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's great! That would be great! Let's do that!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I could use the money; it could give me time to write.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh right great! Welcome aboard!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! Now hey, I need to use the bathroom. Since I don't need any assistance in there, take a break!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: All right!
As Joey goes to the bathroom, Corporate Phoebe enters. She's wearing a business suit and carrying a briefcase.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (entering) Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Phoebe! Guess what?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Joey just hired Chandler to be his assistant!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Ohh that's so sweet! (Her cell phone rings.) Oh! Hang on! (Quickly grabs a cigarette and starts to light it as her phone rings.) Hang onnnnnn!!! (Gets the cigarette lighted and answers the phone.) (On phone.) Go!! No! No-no! I said sell when it hits 50! 5-0, it's a number! It comes after 4-9!! No, it's okay. It's okay, you're allowed one mistake. Just kidding, you are of course fired.
She hangs up as Ross and Rachel enter.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Mon!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mon, look who I ran into! (Gestures towards Rachel.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (gets up and gasps) Oh my God! Rachel!! (Rachel is stunned to see that her long lost friend is still fat.) (Monica goes over and gives Rachel a big bear hug, which is quite easy for her.) You look terrific!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, so do you! Did you lose weight? (She's not quite sure of that one.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You are so sweet to notice! Yes, I lost three and a half pounds!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And, and uh, you-you remember my friend Chandler. (Points to him.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: And that's Phoebe over there! (Points to her.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God, sit down! Sit down! How long as it been since we've seen each other?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (answering it) 1987, the day after Christmas, at Sean McMahon's party. I played you one of my songs, y'know Interplanetary Courtship Ritual.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh yeah. Right. So now, are-do you, do you still do music?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Sometimes, you should come over (Joey returns from the bathroom) sometime! I'll play you one of my other...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (interrupting him and seeing Joey) Oh my God! Joey Tribbiani from Days of Our Lives, just walked in here!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rach, he's a friend of ours.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (stunned) You are friends with Dr. Drake Remoray?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well it's kinda hard to be friends with Drake because of his busy schedule and the fact that he's not real.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Rachel) Hey-hey, or I could bring my keyboard over here sometime!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: He's coming over! He's coming over!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (getting up) Joey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (holding a plate of what looks like Rice Crispies Treats) I know, here-here!! (Hands her the plate.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Ohhh! (Takes the plate.) No! This is my friend Rachel, we went to High School together.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (giggles and can't look at him) Hi!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (shaking Rachel's hand) Hi!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (still not quite able to look at him) Hi! I love you on that show! I watch you everyday! I mean, when you took out your own kidney to save your ex-wife even though she tired to kill you...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, it's always nice to meet the fans.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (turning and whispering to Monica) She's not crazy is she?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) So uh, how you doin'?
Monica and Phoebe's, Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe are there. Phoebe's cell phone rings and she goes through her little routine of lighting a cigarette before answering the phone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hang on! Hang on! Hang on! (Answering the phone.) Go!! Who's this? (Listens) Oh okay, you're gonna like working for me. What's your name? (Listens) What kind of name is Brendy? I... Whatever... Stop talking! All right, from now on your name is Joan. You can pick your own last name.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey there you are!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh-oh, it's my boss!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, here's a list of things for you to do today. Man, this going to be so great! Thank you so much! All right, I got to go to work I'm delivering twins today, but only one of them is mine! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (reading the list) Drop off my dry cleaning. Pick up my vitamins. Teach me how to spell vitamins. Wear in my new jeans.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (laughs) You realize what you are don't you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You're his bitch.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (yelling from Monica's room) No-no!! No!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (panicked) Oh wait! You didn't just sit on my Kit-Kats did you?!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! There-there was a little, a little diff in the market and I lost 13 million dollars.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: But the Kit-Kats are all right?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What am I gonna do?! What am I gonna do?! I can't call my office they'll kill me! I can't call my clients they'll kill themselves! Great, now my chest hearts.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (louder) My chest hurts! Oh, and now I-I can't breathe.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Phoebe, are you having a heart attack?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, if I were, would-would I have shooting pains up and down my left arm?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yes!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Then yes that is what I'm having. (Takes another puff of the cigarette.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God!
Commercial Break
A hospital, Phoebe is recovering from her heart attack as Ross, Monica, and Chandler are there to comfort and support her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on Pheebs, it's not that bad! Y'know most people would be excited if they didn't have to work for a couple of weeks.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Most people don't like their jobs, I love my job! I have not been working for three hours and I'm already going crazy. I miss Joan.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Honey, having a heart attack is nature's way of telling you to slow it down.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I always thought having a heart attack was nature's way of telling you to die! (Phoebe glares at him.) But you're not gonna die. I mean, you are going to die, but you're not gonna die today. I wish I was dead.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Let's take a walk. (They start to leave.) Y'know maybe you should consider writing for Talking Out of Your Ass magazine! (They exit.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (To Ross) So what's going on with you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well umm, I've been doing a lot more of my kara-tay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Still going through that dry spell with Carol?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: How long has it been since you had sex?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well, last weekend...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh that's not so bad.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...will be two months...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That is.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: ...since I stopped trying.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Maybe you need to spice things up a little.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What-what do you mean?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know. You could tie her up, she could tie you up; you could eat stuff off each other...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Y'know, dirty talk, menage a trois, toys...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Roll playing... You could be the warden; she could be the prisoner. You could be the pirate; she could be the wench!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay, I think I got it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah! Or too, you could be two stockbrokers and you're-you're-you're rolling around naked on the trading floor and everybody's watching! (Ross looks at her.) It never happened.

A hospital hallway, Chandler is sitting on a gurney with his hands spread out behind his back. Then Monica comes and plops down on the gurney and one of his hands. Chandler immediately recoils in extreme pain.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Sorry. So how's it going with Joey?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh just great. He beeps me now with codes. One is, "Bring me food." Two is, "I'm with a girl, bring us food." Three is, "I'm lost and I can't find food."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey! Is uh, is she gonna be all right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah! She's right in there! (Points to Phoebe's room.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh great. (Starts to go in.) (To Chandler) Hey! Go take off those pants, they look ready!
Silvercup Studios, Joey is showing Rachel around the set.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, and over there is Brady's Pub where I like to unwind after a long day of surgeoning.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! This is so amazing! What else? What else?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, that is a large piece of television equipment. (Points at a large piece of television equipment as an old man walks by.) And uh that is an old man! Hey old man!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All righty, what do you say we head back to my place?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (laughs) Wow! Umm, y'know, I-I would really love to, but I-I shouldn't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Why? (In Drake's voice.) Why can't the world stop turning, just for a moment? Just for us?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (awestruck, then not) Isn't that a line from the show?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh, yeah but uh, (In Drake's voice) I may have said those things before but, I never truly meant them. Until now.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's a line from the show too!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, you watch too much TV.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (approaching) Here you go Joe, here's the freshly squeezed orange juice you asked for. (Hands it to him.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks! (Looks at it.) Yeah, there's pulp in that. (Hands it back.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I thought we talked about this. I don't like pulp. No pulp. Pulp isn't juice. All juice, okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sorry, I guess I just like the pulp.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God, I'm sorry, I'm being so rude. (Turns to Rachel.) Rachel, would like a soda or something? Because Chandler would run right out and get it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah sure, iced tea would be great.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) Iced tea.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, anything for you sir?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Rachel) Did I not just tell him?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (mouthing it to him) Yes, you did.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) Okay look, Chandler, if this (Motions back and forth indicating the arrangement.) you have got to listen! (Tugs on his ear.) (Chandler glares at him.) You're gonna throw that juice at me, aren't ya?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's not all juice! (Rachel quickly gets out of the way.)
Ross and Carol's, Ross is trying to talk to Carol about what Phoebe told him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So honey, this morning was fun, huh? Me hopping in on you in the shower there.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Yeah! And maybe someday we could get a place with two bathrooms.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look Carol umm, I was, I was thinking maybe uh, maybe we can spice things up a little.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: What do you mean?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Carol our sex life is-it's just not working...

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: (entering) Dad!! (Runs and hugs him.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey there little fella! Hey, uh-hey, why don't we get some shoes on ya, huh? Hey, why don't you show dad how you can put your shoes on, in your room! Yay!!

lines.speaker: Ben
lines.text: Yay! (Runs off.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yay! (To Carol) Seriously, our sex life... I was thinking, maybe I don't know, we could try some-some new things. Y'know? For fun?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Like what?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Well I don't know umm, (Pause) what if we were too tie each other up? (Carol's shocked and obviously doesn't like that idea.) Umm, some people eat stuff off one another. (Carol doesn't like that idea either.) Nah! Umm, y'know we-we could try dirty talk? (Carol still says no.) Umm, we could, we could have a threesome.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: (quickly) I love that idea!
Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is eating breakfast as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Who sold a story to Archie Comics?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh my God! That's great! Oh wow! (Hugs him.) You're a published writer! I wish I had a present for you!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute! (Quickly checks her pockets and pulls out...) My last Kit-Kat bar!
Chandler tries to take it, but Monica won't let go. He tugs harder, and she still doesn't budge.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You wanna share it?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Hey! Hey Chandler look, I know you're mad, but I just want to say I'm sorry. I-I was a total jerk. Completely o-over the line. Uh, I just I hate pulp! Y'know? I mean, y'know how Monica feels about low fat mayonnaise?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's not mayonnaise!!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, o-o-o-o-okay anyway, I just wanted to say I'm sorry. Here. (Hands him a cup.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What's this?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Fresh squeezed orange juice, with pulp! Just the way you like it.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Aww, thanks man. (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey Joey, Chandler sold a story to Archie Comics!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God! That's great! Congratulations! What's the story?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh you wouldn't uh, care. It's just a stupid comic book story.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Are you kidding me?! I love Archie! And the whole gang!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well uh, Archie needs money to fix his jalopy (Joey laughs), uh but he doesn't want Reggie to just give him the money. So Reggie hires him as his assist-as his butler. And then makes him do all these crazy things like bring him milkshakes that can't have lumps in them.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wait a minute. That sounds a little familiar! Did they already do that one? 'Cause I think I read it!
Central Perk, Monica is there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh Mon, listen I have to ask! Okay, Joey Tribbiani invited me back to his apartment, now does he do this with a lot of girls?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, a lot. A lot, a lot!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! And I'm one of them!! Wow! Oh, I just cannot believe this! I mean, Joey Tribbiani!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, y'know it's none of my business, but aren't you married?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah. Oh I just wish we could not be married for a little bit! Y'know I just wish we could be like on a break!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you're not.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, it's so easy for you I mean, you're not married, you get to have sex with who ever you want!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah I can! (Laughs) And don't think I don't, because I do! I mean all the time, you betcha! (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Monica. You've, you've done it right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (giggles) Of course I have! What do you think, I'm some 30 year old virgin?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God! You're a 30 year old virgin!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Say it louder, I don't think the guy all the way in the back heard you!

lines.speaker: Guy All the Way in the Back
lines.text: Yeah, I heard it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's not like, I haven't any opportunities. I mean, y'know, I'm just waiting for the perfect guy. I'm seeing this guy Roger, all right? He's not perfect, but umm, I think maybe I should just get it over with. Y'know, give him my flower.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh my God!! Do it!! Honey, you've waited long enough!!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know what? You are right?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yes!! I mean sex does not have to be a big deal! There shouldn't be all this rules and restrictions! Y'know, people should be able to sleep with who ever they want, whenever...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Rachel! I'm never gonna think it's okay for you to cheat on your husband!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh what do you know? Virgin!
The hospital, Ross and Monica are in Phoebe's room. Phoebe is in the bathroom and Monica notices smoke coming out from underneath the door.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe, why is smoke coming out of the bathroom?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh yeah, the doctor said that could be one of the side effects.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Phoebe! Put that cigarette out!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No! It's not a cigarette! The smoke is coming out of me!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Put it out!!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay! Okay! (Puts it out and comes out of the bathroom.) I'm so glad you're here.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on. (Helps her into bed as her phone rings.) I got it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, give it to me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I got it!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Give it!
He does a kara-tay move to silence her, then answers the phone.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (on the phone) Hello? (Listens.) No she can't come to the phone right now. (Listens.) Oh, right no problem. Okay, bye-bye. (Hangs up.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Was it my work? Were they mad? Was it Jack? Did he yell?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: J-j-just relax, nobody yelled. Jack just was calling to make sure that you were getting better.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank God.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (To Monica) Yeah, she's fired.

Rachel and Barry's bedroom, Rachel is watching Days of Our Lives. Of course it's a Dr. Drake Remoray scene. It's set in a hospital room, and Dr. Wesley and a nurse are talking about a female patient with a bandage around her head.

lines.speaker: Nurse
lines.text: You've done all you can Dr. Wesley. You have got to let her go.

lines.speaker: Dr. Wesley
lines.text: Good-bye and God speed, Hope Brady.
He goes to turn off a machine. Suddenly, Dr. Drake Remoray appears at the door with two cops!

lines.speaker: Dr. Drake Remoray
lines.text: Not so fast Wesley! (Rachel does a silent clap.)

lines.speaker: Dr. Wesley
lines.text: (with evil dripping off his tongue) Remoray!

lines.speaker: Dr. Drake Remoray
lines.text: That's right Wesley! I just stopped by to say that, you're not a real doctor! And that woman's brain, is fine!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (very relived) Oh! Thank God!
[Cut back to the TV, the cops are leading Dr. Wesley out, and as they pass Remoray and Wesley exchange evil glances.]

lines.speaker: Dr. Drake Remoray
lines.text: Hope! Hope!

lines.speaker: Hope
lines.text: (sleepily) Drake!

lines.speaker: Dr. Drake Remoray
lines.text: You're not dying Hope, you're gonna live a long, healthy life. With me.

lines.speaker: Hope
lines.text: Oh Drake.
[Drake and Hope kiss.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! (She picks up the phone, Joey's phone number, and starts to dial.) Here we go! Okay! (On phone.) Hi, Joey! It's Rachel! Umm, I am free tomorrow night. Yeah, sure, sure I can bring some sandwiches.
Commercial Break
{Transcriber's Note: This is where Part II begins, which means this is now episode 616.}
Ross and Carol's, Carol is working on something at the table and Ross is reading a newspaper on the couch.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: So honey this uh, this threesome thing umm, I mean how-how are you gonna start to find...

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Ooh, actually I've been making a list of all the women I know who might be into doing this!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh. (He takes the notepad she was using and looks at it.) Wow! (Flips to another page.) Huh. (Flips another page.) Boy! (Flips another page.) Well, someone's been doing their homework. (Flips two more pages.)

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Yeah. Ooh, and I know Gail Rosten is in there twice, but she is so...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I know. (Laughs) Y'know, just-just talking about it is getting me kinda...

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Oh, me too.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? Well, I-I think Ben's asleep.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Oh umm, y'know I think it would be better if we just save it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah. Right. Save it. I can do that. (Gets up and does a little kara-tay.)
The hospital, Chandler and Monica are there with Phoebe as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey, how's it going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, I've got to get out of this bed, I'm going crazy here. Crazy!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (handing her a cup) Here you go sweetie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What the hell is this, herbal tea? I hate herbal tea!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: But, I put some honey in it.
Phoebe mocks what Monica just said. Ross pulls Chandler aside.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She doesn't know she was fired yet, does she?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, the doctors say it may kill her.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: What are you two girls whispering about over there?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (To Ross) But I think we should tell her.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Pheebs, maybe this whole heart attack thing is a sign, that-that you should start think about getting a different job.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay, what is this? A stupid contest? Because we got a winner here! (Points at Ross.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Listen Phoebe, he's right. People are not supposed to have heart attacks at 31.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I know! But if I didn't work there, what else would I do?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, you used to like playing the guitar.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah that was lucrative! Smart like your brother!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh, what about y'know the massage thing? That never gave you a heart attack.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hmm, pulling in a salary in the high six figures or rubbing gross naked people for chump change-ooh, what do I do?! What will I do?!
Joey's apartment, (The one he had when he was Dr. Drake Remoray, because he still is.) Rachel is there and admiring the big ceramic fake dog.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh, I mean it's just so realistic!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I know. (Joey is sitting in this tall chair that is made up of balls on polls. You'll have to see it to know what I mean.) Yeah, his name is Pat.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Pat the dog. Oh! Oh! I get it!! (Laughs and finishes her drink.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (climbing down from his chair) Do you uh, do you-ready for a refill?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I probably shouldn't-so I will! (Joey starts making her refill and Rachel notices that rain thing Joey has.) Oh! Wow! It's like it's raining!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Pretty cool, huh? But if you're thinking you can put a fish in there and it wouldn't get sucked up into the mechanism, well you'd be wrong.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Umm, can I use your bathroom?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's uh, right through there. (Points.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (Starts to go.) God y'know, if someone told me a week ago that I would be peeing in Joey Tribbiani's apartment...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, life's pretty great isn't it?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah, it sure is!
Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is pouring wine for her boyfriend, Dr. Roger.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I hope you're hungry, we're starting with oysters. And y'know what they say about oysters, don't you?

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: They have parasites?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! Umm well, some people say that Oysters are an aphrodisiac.

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: What people?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: People! People say it! Come here! (She grabs him and kisses him.)

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: So oysters, huh?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: And then we're gonna have a little Middle Eastern cous-cous. Something we can eat, with our hands.

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: Y'know, it's funny, but when we were studying communicable diseases...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No-no-no, no! It's sensual!

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: Ohh! Didn't know! Okay!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay! (They kiss again and his beeper goes off.) Ohhh no!

lines.speaker: Dr. Roger
lines.text: I'm sorry sweetie, it's the hospital. The food looks great, maybe save me some?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I can't promise anything. (She starts to dig in.)
Ross and Carol's, Ross and Carol are waiting anxiously for their new partner to arrive.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We're really gonna do this, huh?

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Looks like it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know, if, if this is too weird for you, we can still back out at... (A knock on the door interrupts him.)

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: (jumping up to get it) I got it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: (opening the door) Susan! Hi! (Who'd you think it was gonna be?)

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.text: Hey! (They hug.)

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Thank you so much for coming.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.text: Oh, I wouldn't miss it for the world.
They start moving towards the bedroom, never taking their eyes off each other. They move past Ross and stop.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm-I'm Ross by the way.

lines.speaker: Susan
lines.text: (not taking her eyes off Carol) Hello Ross. (Takes off her coat and hands it to him.) I love what you've done with this space.

lines.speaker: Carol
lines.text: Thank you so much.
They disappear into the bedroom leaving Ross standing in the living room holding Susan's coat.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: How hot is this?!
Monica and Phoebe's, Chandler and Monica are eating Monica's dinner.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm sorry you're here with me instead of Roger.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, me too.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, I could make it seem like he's here. (Imitates him.) "Here's some little known facts about cous-cous. They didn't add the second cous until 1979." (Mumbles something further.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Stop it!! That's not funny!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm sorry, okay? It just-tonight was supposed to be y'know, it was supposed to be a big deal.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What was tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You don't want to know what tonight was.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (Pause.) What was tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, tonight was-was going to be my first time.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: With Roger? (Monica shyly looks away.) Not just with Roger?! (Monica shrugs.) Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right relax Mr. I've Had Sex Four Times!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Four different women! I've had sex way more times!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How many?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Nine.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I was just waiting for the perfect guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well good, good for you. You really think that Roger is the perfect guy?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No. He's not a horrible guy.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey that's what I tell girls about me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler, I'm gonna die a virgin!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No you are not! You are sweet and wonderful and this is gonna happen for you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh really? When? Do you wanna do it with me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay. (They both realize what he just said.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I was kidding.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So was I.
Joey's apartment, Rachel is now three sheets to the wind and Joey is watching her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Joey, you're such an amazing actor! (He smiles.) How do you know where Dr. Drake Remoray leaves off and Joey Tribbiani begins?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well, with Dr. Drake they always tell me what to say. And with Joey, I pretty much have to make it up on my own.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! Tell me something Joey-(She falls off the couch)-Whoa! I just fell right off the couch there.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah you did.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (She climbs back onto the couch.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Here you go. Let me ask you a question.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: When was the last time someone told you just how beautiful you are?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Wow! I can't, I can't feel my hands.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Come, come here.
He takes her hands in his and kisses each one, then kisses her on the lips. When the break the kiss, Rachel starts to get nauseous and throw up. Joey backs away in horror.
Monica and Phoebe's, continued from earlier. Monica and Chandler are still discussing the previous question.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: We can't do this.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: No! (They both laugh.) Oyster?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! (Takes it.) If-if-if we did do this there would be a lot of pressure on me, y'know? Because you've been waiting a very long time and I wouldn't want to disappoint you.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah but see I have nothing to compare it too. So even if you're horrible, how would I know?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I do like that.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: It's harder for me! I have those four other women to compete with!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well, if it helps there were only three. So it would just be for tonight, right?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Absolutely! It would just be one friend (Points at Chandler) helping out another friend. (Points at herself.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Stop it! We're doing this! Let's do it!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Noo!! Okay!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay! (They both get up.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Umm, do you have any uhh, moves?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I have some moves.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I have no moves. (He moves in to kiss her and she laughs and backs away.) Okay, whatcha doin' there?! (Giggles.) Oh y'know what? I'm sorry, this is just too weird.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah, let's just forget it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What if I turn out the lights? (Runs to shut them off.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay!
She turns out the lights and in the darkened room Chandler starts to moan.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sexily) Yeah?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's the couch.
Commercial Break
Monica's bedroom, she has just lost her flower to Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh my God!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I know! I'll tell you something, we are gonna do that again!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh, okay! (He rolls over to do that again.)
Joey's apartment, the next morning, Rachel is passed out on the couch.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (entering) Morning!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (wakes up suddenly and realizes where she is) Oh right.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (groans) Oh God. Oh I can't believe Joey Tribbiani heard me throw up!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well he actually saw you a little bit too.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Noo! Oh God we did-we didn't, we didn't uhh...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: No! No! No, not after seeing that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God I'm just a horrible person.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wh-why?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Because I'm married. That's right, I am a married woman! And I came to a TV star's apartment to have an affair! Uck!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: That's ridiculous! I'm not a "Star," just a regular famous actor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah and I'm a horrible, horrible person.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Rachel, would you stop saying that?! Hey-hey look, remember on the show when-when Caprice was dying and she gave me...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: The ring from the cave, yeah.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow! Uh okay, well uh... (He gets up, opens a drawer, and pulls out the ring.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (seeing the ring and gasping) Oh my God, they let you keep that stuff?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! As long as they don't find out you can keep whatever you want! And I want you to have it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No! No-no-no...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yes! Yes!! And every time you look at it, I want you to remember that you are a good person. Okay, you've had the chance to cheat, and with me, but you didn't. And that's what this ring stands for.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But I thought that ring stood for Caprice's undying love for her brother.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Look, do you want the ring or not?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah!
Phoebe's hospital room, Joey and Ross enter as Phoebe comes out of the bathroom wearing her robe.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look at you! You're up!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I thought I'd try to take a walk. Would you pour me some water? I'll be back soon.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Whoa-whoa-whoa! You're not gonna use the pay phone to call work, are ya?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No. I've learned my lesson.
She goes out into the hall and when she's there and the door is closed; she rips off her robe to reveal her work clothes.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Let's go! Come on! Move it! (Grabs her coat.) Come on! (To an old man who's holding her shoes and briefcase.) Shoes! Briefcase! (Takes them both.) Thanks Lou, good luck with the gall bladder. (She leaves.)
[Cut back to her room, Joey and Ross are sitting there waiting for her.]

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Joe did... Did you ever have a threesome?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (not quite sure of how to answer that) Well uh, look Ross I uh, I think Carol's great and I'm sure you're a very attractive man, but I....

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No! The reason I'm asking is that... I sorta had one last night.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right! So, was it amazing?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It was, it was okay.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Just okay-Did you do it right?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, it's just did, did you ever go to a party and think, "Would really anyone miss me if I weren't here?"

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Huh. But still Ross, you're worst day with two women, pretty much better than any other day! Y'know what I mean?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh-oh, absolutely!
They both laugh.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's just, my part seemed to be over pretty quickly and then, and then there was a lot of waiting around.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: But you got to be with both of them, right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not-not really. Th-th-there was just Carol.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Not the other one?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No, she kept kicking me away!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, you don't want that.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: No!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well hey, at least you got to see a lot of stuff, right?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh I a lot of stuff!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You got a little bored?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: A little. Yeah. I made a snack.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah? What did ya have?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Just a sandwich. Turkey, a little mustard...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sounds good.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It really was!
Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is making a sandwich as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let me tell you about this chick I scored with last night! Oh no wait a minute that was you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey, check me out, I'm a slut!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you uh, want to do something tonight?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh I can't. Dr. Roger is coming over again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh. Oh right! Right! Because you're still seeing him and uh, he's a good guy. I mean, I remember a time when... (He fakes falling asleep.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! Totally! Totally, and you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Great! It's so amazing! I mean, last time Dr. Roger came over, I was so nervous, but then after being with you I'm all like, "Can the doctor see me now?"

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I bet he can.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Y'know, I don't have an appointment, but I sure could use a physical. (He laughs halfheartedly) Are you sure you're okay?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah! Yeah! Don't worry about me, I'll be fine! (Does a kara-tay move.)
Rachel and Barry's bedroom, Rachel is returning from her disastrous attempt at an affair to find that Barry was much, much more successful with his.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ohh! My God! Barry!!

lines.speaker: Barry
lines.text: You-you-you said you were gonna be away all weekend!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh that's right! I'm sorry! I-I am early! Finish! Please!!
Phoebe's office, she is arriving without the knowledge that she's been fired.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Surprise! Look who's back!

lines.speaker: Arthur
lines.text: Hey Pheebs!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Arthur
lines.text: (To another coworker) Call security. (To Phoebe) Pheebs, didn't you get fired?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Uh, I don't think so!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Phoebe?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Jack!! Hey!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: What are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: All better! Back to work! Except this clown from research told me I was fired. He should do his research, huh?

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Well, you were fired.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Nu-uh!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: I told that guy who answered your phone.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, okay I didn't get that message. So this doesn't count-Anyway, I'll be in my office.

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Uh, Phoebe you-you don't have an office.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: That's all right, I'll work here. This is goo, next to this plant. (She picks a place in the lobby next to a plant.)

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: (approaches her) Phoebe, listen...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're in my office! Look, I have made a lot of cash for this company! Okay? I am talking big bucks! Pesos! Yen! Rubles! You make one little mistake...

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: You lost 13 million dollars.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh, so this is all about money! Y'know it's bad enough that-Ow! Oh, you have got to be kidding!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Are you all right?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm having another heart attack!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I'm having another heart attack!! Call 9-1-1!!

lines.speaker: Jack
lines.text: Take it easy. (Sits her down.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (to Arthur, he's the guy calling 9-1-1) Dumbass!

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Hey Pheebs! How's it going?!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Well, they fired me and I'm having heart attack.

lines.speaker: Woman
lines.text: Wow! Well, welcome back!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Yeah.
Central Perk, Ross is there as Rachel storms in.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Ross!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey Rachel.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Is Joey Tribbiani here?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Umm, no.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, if you see him, will you please tell him that I'm looking for him and that this I am not gonna throw up!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: That-that's always good news. Are you okay?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Me? I'm great! I'm fine! I'm sooo good!! But, you know who's not great?! Men! You're a man right Ross?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Sit down!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay. (He does so.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Let me uh, let me ask you something, do wedding vows mean squat to you people?! And why is it that the second we tell you we're going out of town, bamn there you are in bed with the neighbor's dog walker?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We're sorry.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No seriously! Seriously! What has happened to the sanctity of marriage?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Didn't you spend last night at Joey's?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Aw what are you?! A detective?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look I-I don't know what's going on with you and your husband and what is hopefully an adult dog walker, look can I just say not all men are like that.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh. (Doesn't believe it.)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! There are some men who will do whatever it takes to make their marriage work! Okay? There are some men who will stand by and-and watch as their wives engage in-in what only can be described as a twosome with some-some woman she barely knows from the gym!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Who are these men?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Men. I guy I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, you might want to tell him it sounds like his wife is (whispers) gay.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: She is not... (Realizes) She's gay. Oh my God. She is so gay! I can't believe this.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Good day for married people huh?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry your husband cheated on you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'm sorry your wife is gay. I guess women aren't that great either.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Try telling my wife that.
Monica and Phoebe's, Monica is blowing out a candle as Chandler enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (sticking his head in the door) Okay to come in?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Yeah, come on, eat, whatever you want. Dr. Roger got beeped again.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah I know, guess who beeped him?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm the ruptured spleen. (Laughs.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Why would you do that?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Because you shouldn't be with him. (Pause.) You should be with me.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Really?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yeah! When you were talking about Roger, that was killing me! Look, things like last night they don't just happen. Y'know? Or at least not to me. Or with the other two women, in the morning y'know I was just lying there and I couldn't wait to just go hang out with my friends, but with you I always y'know with a friend.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I know you probably don't want to go out with me, y'know because I make too many jokes and I've never been in a serious relationship and I guess I'm not technically a "doctor..."
Monica runs over and kisses him.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: There was just one woman, wasn't there?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: No, there were two.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Including me?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh yeah.
Ending Credits
Central Perk, Phoebe is singing a new song as the gang looks on.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (singing)
It only takes two heart attacks to finally make you see...
One of them won't do it, but the second one will set you free...
Tell all your hate and anger, it's time to say good-bye...
And that is just what I will do, soon as those bastards I work for die!
La, la-la-la, la-la-la-la, la-la-la, la-la-la......
End
